title: BEM-849 validate protocol
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 23:08 (UTC+3)'
proto=Path('governance/protocols/BEM848_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL_TABLE.md')
text=proto.read_text(errors='ignore') if proto.exists() else ''
required=['Источник Claude','Decision:','| Блок |','dispatch result','runtime-state','real Claude response','Invalid JSON','Версионировать']
missing=[x for x in required if x not in text]
status='protocol_table_validated' if proto.exists() and not missing else 'protocol_table_incomplete'
next_action='continue roadmap implementation from agreed protocol; harden dispatch/runtime proofs and prepare operator-facing md/doc export' if status=='protocol_table_validated' else 'complete missing protocol sections: '+', '.join(missing)
state={'bem':'BEM-849','status':status,'protocol_path':str(proto),'missing_protocol_markers':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem849_validate_protocol_and_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem849_validate_protocol_and_next.md').write_text('# BEM-849 | Validate Protocol And Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-849'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem849_validate_protocol_and_next.json','governance/reports/bem849_validate_protocol_and_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Validated the agreed protocol table and wrote the next active roadmap step so checkpoint reporting does not stop development')
"""
No issue comments.
